title: FastMCP Tool Registration Metadata Schema
description: Defines FastMCP tool registration metadata, including derived name and deferred schema status.

name.description: The derived name of the tool, typically formatted as mcp__<row>_<group>_<action>.

description.description: Description of the tool for the LLM to understand.

defer_schema.description: If true, defers full schema loading at boot to save token budget. Required to be true for most tools to stay under the 500 token cold-boot limit.

parameters.description: The JSON schema of the arguments the tool accepts. May be omitted or minimal if defer_schema is true.
